creator: developers.openai.com

evidence.text: to evaluate it the same way you would [any other prompt for LLM applications](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/evaluation-best-practices). _Evals_ (short for _evaluations_) check whether a model’s output, and the steps it took to produce it, match what you intended. Instead of asking “does this feel better?” (or relying on vibes), evals let you ask concrete questions like: * Did the agent invoke the skill? * Did it run the expected commands? * Did it produce outputs that follow the conventions you care about? Concretely, an eval is: a prompt → a captured run (trace + artifacts) → a small set of checks → a score you can compare over t

title: Testing Agent Skills Systematically with Evals | OpenAI Developers
